findings.title: Unvalidated user URL passed to requests.get()
findings.message: HTTP request with potentially user-controlled URL. Server-Side Request Forgery allows attackers to make requests to internal services or cloud metadata endpoints.

findings.title: Hardcoded cloud metadata endpoint 169.254.169.254
findings.message: Hardcoded cloud metadata endpoint detected. Access to 169.254.169.254 is a primary SSRF exploitation target.

findings.title: HTTP request without redirect control
findings.message: HTTP request without allow_redirects=False. Attackers can exploit redirect chains to bypass SSRF protections.

findings.title: DNS resolution without rebinding protection
findings.message: DNS resolution without rebinding protection. DNS rebinding attacks can bypass hostname-based SSRF validation.

findings.title: Hardcoded private IP range in URL
findings.message: Hardcoded private IP address (192.168.x.x) in URL string. Use service discovery or environment variables instead.
